name: Tomura Shigaraki

Sunset Date: Villain x Villain

The League has been non-stop busy after they became the Paranormal Liberation Front, always planning or organizing. So, when Tomura has a few hours to himself, all he can think about is spending time with his lover.

•❅───✧❅✦❅✧───❅•

Hey guys! I might not post for a few days (about 1-3 days). So sorry! I’m super busy and have a lot of personal stuff to work through but I’ll try to find time to post because I really love writing these ❤️
